title: High quality DNA extraction from Fungi (small scale)
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.exmbfk6

steps.title: Collect tissue/spores (10-20mg) in a 2ml...
steps.instruction: Collect tissue/spores (10-20mg) in a 2ml eppendorf tube with one metal bead. lyse tissue/spores with liquid nitrogen in a precooled tissuelycer. using 50Hz for 1min.

steps.title: Make lysis buffer by mixing buffer A+B+C (2
steps.instruction: Make lysis buffer by mixing buffer A+B+C (2.5:2.5:1 + 0.1%PVP final) and briefly heat to 64 °C. Let cool to room temperature, add RNAse T1 to lysis buffer according to 1:1750 of RNAse T1:lysis buffer ratio

steps.title: Add 500ul lysis buffer into the...
steps.instruction: Add 500ul lysis buffer into the powder, briefly vortex, incubate at 64oC for 30 mins 00:30:00

steps.title: Add 100 ul (0
steps.instruction: Add 100 ul (0.2 vol) of KAc 5M, mix by inversion, incubate on ice for max 5 mins 00:05:00

steps.title: Spin at 4 o C at...
steps.instruction: Spin at 4 o C at max speed for 10 mins 00:10:00

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to fresh eppendorf tube...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to fresh eppendorf tube containing 500ul (1vol) (P/C/I) and mix by inversion for 2 mins 00:02:00

steps.title: Spin at 4 °C and max...
steps.instruction: Spin at 4 °C and max speed for 10 mins 00:10:00

steps.title: Transfer supernatant (~400ul) to fresh eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant (~400ul) to fresh eppendorf tube containing 500ul RT isopropanol

steps.title: Spin at 4 °C and max...
steps.instruction: Spin at 4 °C and max speed for 30 mins 00:30:00

steps.title: Carefully remove supernatant with pipette and...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove supernatant with pipette and wash with 1mL fresh 70% Ethanol, invert several times to dislodge pellet

steps.title: Spin in table top centrifuge for 5mins at 13000g 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Spin in table top centrifuge for 5mins at 13000g 00:05:00

steps.title: Remove supernatant with pipette and wash...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant with pipette and wash with 1mL fresh 70% Ethanol, invert several times to dislodge pellet

steps.title: Spin in table top centrifuge for 5mins at 13000g 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Spin in table top centrifuge for 5mins at 13000g 00:05:00

steps.title: Spin in table top centrifuge for 1min at 13000g 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Spin in table top centrifuge for 1min at 13000g 00:01:00

steps.title: Remove the remaining ethanol with pipette
steps.instruction: Remove the remaining ethanol with pipette

steps.title: Add 50ul of TE buffer and...
steps.instruction: Add 50ul of TE buffer and flick the tube slightly for mixing. DO NOT vortex as it shears DNA. Store at -20oC. 1ul of extracted DNA can be directly used for PCR analysis. Sometimes, expecially when larger amount of tissue is used, it is better to dillute 10X to 100X of the DNA sample before processing PCR.
